items.title: I Knew It, I Knew You (Taylor Swift) #1 on Hot 100 in July
items.rationale: R1 blind (0.14/0.25 vs 0.52/0.40, family div 0.265) was built on a WRONG inference (Stupid Song displacement). Verification: Taylor held #1 two weeks, lost Jul 4 chart to Ella Langley's country surge; 3 eligible charts remain; Ariana's album lands after window. Both families' R2 converged 0.16: reclaim live but market's Luminate mid-week data edge respected. Ask 0.14 -> net +0.01, skip.
sources: billboard.com Gary Trust pieces: IKN debut (Jun 20), Ariana debut (Jun 13), Rodrigo album week (Jun 27)

items.title: How high will BTC get in July? | Above $72,500
items.rationale: All four blind estimators (0.15/0.11/0.18/0.18) above market ask 0.11; arbiter MC 0.128 (mu0). Consensus 0.155 -> net edge +0.035, below 5pt threshold. Directional note for the record: models see the 0.10-0.11 ask as slightly cheap.

items.title: Kash Patel out as FBI Director before Aug 1
items.rationale: Perfect four-way agreement at 0.03-0.04 vs market mid 0.075: STOCK Act disclosure lapse is lawyered (DAG no-conflict letter), no acute trigger, low 29-day base rate. NO side edge +0.028 after fees - insufficient. Skip.

items.title: Alito announces departure before Aug 1
items.rationale: Consensus 0.1675 vs ask 0.11 -> net +0.0475, misses threshold by 0.25pt. NEAR-MISS worth watching: all four estimators price the retracted Totenberg report as real smoke above market. Rules verified: announcement counts regardless of effective date. Re-examine if any new signal.

items.title: Best AI in Jul 2026 = Claude (LMArena top rank Jul 31)
items.rationale: R1 consensus 0.63 (apparent +24.7pt NO edge) was GIGO from a stale third-party snapshot. Verification: actual lmarena.ai shows Anthropic double-lock (#1 Fable 5 High, #2 Opus 4.8 Thinking, GPT 5.5 xHigh #3); GPT-5.6 Sol announced Jun 26 but government-gated limited preview, not accruing Arena votes. Both families R2 -> 0.92. Ask 0.90 -> net +0.01, skip. Conflict-of-interest handled: Claude family corrected DOWNWARD from naive 0.95.
sources: openai.com/index/previewing-gpt-5-6-sol (Jun 26, limited preview at government request)
